statements.sql: INSERT INTO silver.FactInternetSales (SalesOrderNumber, SalesOrderLineNumber, ProductKey, CustomerKey, SalesTerritoryKey, OrderQuantity, UnitPrice, ExtendedAmount, SalesAmount, TaxAmt, Freight, OrderDate, DueDate, ShipDate) SELECT h.SalesOrderNumber, CAST(d.SalesOrderDetailID % 127 AS TINYINT) AS SalesOrderLineNumber, d.ProductID AS ProductKey, h.CustomerID AS CustomerKey, h.TerritoryID AS SalesTerritoryKey, d.OrderQty AS OrderQuantity, d.UnitPrice, CAST(d.UnitPrice * d.OrderQty AS MONEY) AS ExtendedAmount, d.LineTotal AS SalesAmount, CAST(h.TaxAmt / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS MONEY) AS TaxAmt, CAST(h.Freight / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS MONEY) AS Freight, h.OrderDate, h.DueDate, h.ShipDate FROM bronze.SalesOrderHeader h JOIN bronze.SalesOrderDetail d ON h.SalesOrderID = d.SalesOrderID

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT h.SalesOrderNumber, CAST(d.SalesOrderDetailID % 127 AS TINYINT) AS SalesOrderLineNumber, d.ProductID AS ProductKey, h.CustomerID AS CustomerKey, h.TerritoryID AS SalesTerritoryKey, d.OrderQty AS OrderQuantity, d.UnitPrice, CAST(d.UnitPrice * d.OrderQty AS MONEY) AS ExtendedAmount, d.LineTotal AS SalesAmount, CAST(h.TaxAmt / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS MONEY) AS TaxAmt, CAST(h.Freight / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS MONEY) AS Freight, h.OrderDate, h.DueDate, h.ShipDate FROM bronze.SalesOrderHeader h JOIN bronze.SalesOrderDetail d ON h.SalesOrderID = d.SalesOrderID
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH import AS ( SELECT h.SalesOrderNumber, d.SalesOrderDetailID, d.ProductID, h.CustomerID, h.TerritoryID, d.OrderQty, d.UnitPrice, d.LineTotal, h.TaxAmt, h.Freight, h.OrderDate, h.DueDate, h.ShipDate, h.SalesOrderID, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS line_count FROM bronze.SalesOrderHeader h JOIN bronze.SalesOrderDetail d ON h.SalesOrderID = d.SalesOrderID ), logical AS ( SELECT SalesOrderNumber, CAST(SalesOrderDetailID % 127 AS TINYINT) AS SalesOrderLineNumber, ProductID AS ProductKey, CustomerID AS CustomerKey, TerritoryID AS SalesTerritoryKey, OrderQty AS OrderQuantity, UnitPrice, CAST(UnitPrice * OrderQty AS MONEY) AS ExtendedAmount, LineTotal AS SalesAmount, CAST(TaxAmt / line_count AS MONEY) AS TaxAmt, CAST(Freight / line_count AS MONEY) AS Freight, OrderDate, DueDate, ShipDate FROM import ), final AS ( SELECT * FROM logical ) SELECT * FROM final

source_tables.summary: Both queries use the same source tables: bronze.SalesOrderHeader (h) and bronze.SalesOrderDetail (d)

output_columns.summary: Both queries produce identical output columns in the same order: SalesOrderNumber, SalesOrderLineNumber, ProductKey, CustomerKey, SalesTerritoryKey, OrderQuantity, UnitPrice, ExtendedAmount, SalesAmount, TaxAmt, Freight, OrderDate, DueDate, ShipDate

joins.summary: Both queries use an identical INNER JOIN between SalesOrderHeader (h) and SalesOrderDetail (d) on the predicate h.SalesOrderID = d.SalesOrderID

filters.summary: No filters are applied in either query

aggregation_grain.summary: Both queries operate at the same grain: one row per SalesOrderDetail row. The window function COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) is computed identically in both, with line_count cached in the refactored version's import CTE for efficiency
